visa_type_detail.name: Spouse of a Singapore citizen or Singapore permanent resident (PR)
visa_type_detail.eligibility: Spouse of a Singapore citizen or Singapore permanent resident (PR)

visa_type_detail.name: Unmarried child aged below 21 born within the context of a legal marriage to, or have been legally adopted by a Singapore citizen or PR
visa_type_detail.eligibility: Unmarried child aged below 21 born within the context of a legal marriage to, or have been legally adopted by a Singapore citizen or PR

visa_type_detail.name: Aged parent of a Singapore citizen of at least 21 years old
visa_type_detail.eligibility: Aged parent of a Singapore citizen of at least 21 years old

visa_type_detail.name: Holder of an Employment Pass or S Pass
visa_type_detail.eligibility: Holder of an Employment Pass or S Pass

visa_type_detail.name: Student studying in Singapore and have passed at least one national exam (i.e. PSLE, GCE 'N'/ 'O'/ 'A' levels), or are in the Integrated Programme (IP)
visa_type_detail.eligibility: Student studying in Singapore and have passed at least one national exam (i.e. PSLE, GCE 'N'/ 'O'/ 'A' levels), or are in the Integrated Programme (IP)

essential_apps.description: Official digital identity app for accessing a wide range of government and private sector services in Singapore.
Official health portal app for Singapore, providing access to personal health records, appointment bookings, and health information.
Official app from Singapore's Land Transport Authority, offering public transport information, journey planner, and bus arrival times.
Mobile banking app for DBS Bank, one of Singapore's largest banks, offering account management and transaction services.
Mobile payment app by DBS, allowing users to send money, pay bills, and make QR code payments.
